name: Associated Bank, National Association
description_short: Associated Bank is a Midwest-based full-service bank offering personal, business, and commercial banking products including checking, savings, mortgages, and digital banking services.
description_long:
Associated Bank, National Association is a regional financial institution based in the Midwest that provides comprehensive banking services to personal, business, and commercial customers. The bank has announced a merger with American National, signaling its evolution within the regional banking landscape. Associated Bank operates through multiple service channels including branch locations, ATM networks, and digital platforms.

The bank offers a diverse range of products across three main customer segments. For personal customers, they provide checking accounts (three account options), savings accounts (minimum $10 deposit), home loans (fixed, adjustable, and government-backed), HELOCs, credit cards with rewards programs, personal loans up to $25,000, and auto financing. Business customers can access business checking, credit products, payroll services, and tax management tools. Commercial customers receive dedicated commercial banking services. All deposit accounts are FDIC-insured and backed by the U.S. Government.

Associated Bank distinguishes itself through its "Midwest-based Customer Care" emphasizing local expertise and regional market knowledge. The bank offers an omnichannel experience through its Associated Bank Digital app (rated 4.8 stars with 65k reviews), web banking, and in-person branch services. Features include automated savings tools, bill pay, real-time alerts, identity secure services, and wealth management solutions. The bank also demonstrates community commitment through CRA programs, grants, and volunteerism initiatives.

As a traditional regional bank, Associated Bank serves customers seeking established financial institution stability and local relationship banking. However, potential customers should note the bank's regional focus may limit physical branch availability outside the Midwest, and the website content does not detail competitive rates, fees, or comprehensive product comparisons that would help consumers make informed decisions.
services: Savings accounts with automated savings tools
Credit cards with rewards and introductory rates
pros: FDIC-insured deposit accounts backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Associated Bank Digital app rated 4.8 stars with 65,000 customer reviews
Savings accounts available with minimum $10 deposit
Personal loans up to $25,000 for various needs
Multiple checking account options designed to fit different lifestyles
Automated savings tools that allow customers to set savings goals
Midwest-based customer care available Monday-Friday 7am-9pm CT and Saturday 8am-5pm CT
Omnichannel access: branches, ATMs, mobile app, web, and phone banking 24/7/365
cons: Regional Midwest-based bank with limited national branch network
Website lacks specific fee structures, interest rates, and APR information for product comparison
No details provided on minimum balance requirements for most account types
Limited information about competitive advantages versus other regional and national banks
Merger with American National announced but timeline and implications unclear from website content

contact.address: 200 N Adams St, Green Bay, WI 54301

best_for: Midwest residents seeking local relationship banking with established financial institution
Small to medium-sized business owners needing comprehensive business banking services
Homebuyers seeking mortgage services with local real estate market expertise
Consumers preferring digital banking with strong mobile app ratings and functionality
diagnosis: Associated Bank is best for Midwest consumers and businesses seeking traditional full-service banking from an established regional institution with strong digital capabilities and local market expertise. The main caveat is that the bank's regional focus and lack of detailed fee/rate information on their website make it difficult for consumers to perform competitive comparisons before opening accounts.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 200 N Adams St, Green Bay, WI 54301
meta_description: Midwest-based full-service bank offering personal, business, and commercial banking including checking, savings, mortgages, and digital services.
